steps.title: Apply Text 2's advice
steps.content: Text 1 describes two friends deciding where to eat and notes that people often hide their true preferences. Text 2 says that hiding preferences does not increase likability and makes decisions harder, so its author would recommend being direct about the lunch choice.

steps.title: Reject avoidance strategies
steps.content: Choice A cancels the plan, which Text 2 never recommends. Choice B asks about the friend's usual preference but still avoids stating one's own. Choice D changes the subject, avoiding the decision entirely. The answer is C.
